contents.text: I'll help you run the tests! Let me first explore the workspace to understand the project structure and find the test files.

todos.content: Explore workspace structure to understand the project
Identify test files and test runner configuration

contents.result:
[project]
name = "boo"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Headless CLI for driving terminal sessions through a native PTY engine"
requires-python = ">=3.10"
dependencies = []

[project.scripts]
boo = "boo.cli:main"

[build-system]
requires = ["hatchling"]
build-backend = "hatchling.build"

[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel]
artifacts = ["boo/*.so", "boo/*.dylib", "boo/*.dll"]

[tool.pytest.ini_options]
testpaths = ["tests"]

[dependency-groups]
dev = ["pytest"]

todos.content: Explore workspace structure to understand the project
Identify test files and test runner configuration
